decontamination_notes: Original scenario written for VulcanBench on 2026-06-28 for the carbyne tier; the house code and rubric are not derived from any existing repository, so they post-date all model training cutoffs.

blocking: BucketIndex uses FLOOR division so negative values bucket correctly: -1..-10 -> -1, -11..-20 -> -2. (Go's built-in / truncates toward zero, which would wrongly put -1 in bucket 0 — that must be handled.)
The change modifies only buckets.go and adds no dependency.

weighted.criterion: It computes a true floor division for negatives (special-casing value<0 or using math.Floor), not Go's default truncating /.
